processes.name: completeInvoice
preconditions: Invoice must have at least one line
Invoice status must be DR (Draft) or IP (In Progress)
All invoice lines must have a product assigned
All invoice lines must have a positive quantity

steps.name: validatePreconditions
steps.description: Check that the invoice meets all preconditions before completing

operation.errorMessage: Invoice does not meet completion preconditions

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject invoices missing lines, wrong status, lines without product, or zero/negative qty

steps.name: assignDocumentNumber
steps.description: Assign the next document number from the sequence to the invoice

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Invoice receives the next available document number from the configured sequence

steps.name: calculateTax
steps.description: Calculate tax amounts for the invoice

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Grand total is updated with the calculated tax amount

steps.name: postAccounting
steps.description: Post accounting entries for the completed invoice

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Accounting entries are created and the invoice is marked as posted

steps.name: updateStatusComplete
steps.description: Set invoice status to CO, mark as processed, and clear the document action

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Invoice status becomes CO, processed=true, documentAction='--'

edgeCases.description: Invoice has no lines - must reject with clear error
One or more lines have zero or negative quantity
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating invalid line quantities

edgeCases.description: A line exists without a product assigned
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating missing product on line
Entire transaction rolls back - status remains unchanged

processes.name: voidInvoice
preconditions: Invoice must not have payments applied

steps.name: validateStatusCompleted
steps.description: Verify the invoice is in Completed status before allowing void

operation.errorMessage: Only completed invoices can be voided

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject void action if invoice is not in CO status

steps.name: reverseAccounting
steps.description: Reverse accounting entries created during completion

behavioral.expectedBehavior: All accounting entries from completion are reversed

steps.name: updateStatusVoid
steps.description: Set invoice status to VO and clear the document action

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void a draft invoice (status DR)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails with VOID_INVALID_STATUS - only CO invoices can be voided

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void an invoice that is already voided (status VO)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - cannot void an already voided invoice

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void an invoice that has payments applied
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - payments must be reversed first
